verbatim_quote: And then, actually, a week later, there's Professor Jeremy, who actually didn't like me very much because I once stole his grad student, you know, his favorite student. And he came to me and was like, you know, Kylian, by the way, I'm still mad that you stole Jake, but I found a new student.
